description: Kosen white plush horse — sewing and restuffing.
itemDetails:
Kosen white plush horse is associated with Kosen (Koesen), the German plush maker established in 1912 and known for naturalistic animal design. Kosen pieces are often produced to a higher realism standard than mass-market plush lines.

Construction may include premium synthetic or natural-look pile fabrics, carefully shaped forms, and firm but soft stuffing for display-quality silhouette. Market value for Kosen is generally above standard gift plush, especially for clean, tagged, and retired models.
